rationale.completeness: All acceptance criteria from the spec are implemented: new session creation, --session resume, --list-sessions, conversation history persistence, model/provider metadata, approved tools, and error handling for invalid session IDs.
rationale.correctness: The implementation is mostly sound with proper error handling for missing sessions and JSON parsing. Minor gaps exist: no error handling for failed directory creation in SessionStore, and hardcoded model fallback before model selection completes could lead to stale model in session.
rationale.style: Follows TypeScript conventions with proper interfaces and type imports. CLI args properly separated into dedicated utility. Matches existing codebase patterns (utils/, types/). Some inconsistency in error handling between index.tsx and cli.ts.
rationale.quality: Clean abstractions with SessionStore class. Well-structured interfaces. Main issue is runCli function growing large with session logic mixed in - could benefit from extraction. Minor issue: '.dexter' magic string duplicated instead of centralized constant.
